ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., WLTW, AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the day */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the watchlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the watchlist was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the watchlist is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist-stock entry */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist the stock belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the stock in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price alert was set */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the price alert is active or not */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used to access the data provider's API */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data provider's API */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data provider */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider the feed comes from */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the feed is for */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data from the feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., historical, real-time) */,
  "feed_format" TEXT /* Format of the data feed (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time when the data feed was last synced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error of the model */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean Squared Error of the model */,
  "r2_score" REAL /* R-squared value of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing the parameters of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
